name: Logical Gate
description: Performs AND, OR, or NOT logic operations.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    a = bool(inputs.get('a', False))
    b = bool(inputs.get('b', False))
    op = inputs.get('operation', 'AND')
    
    if op == 'AND': res = a and b
    elif op == 'OR': res = a or b
    elif op == 'NOT': res = not a
    else: res = False
    
    self.log_info(f"Logic: {a} {op} {b} -> {res}")
    return {'result': res}
